title: Embargoed leave-race-out model selection
summary: Because the label is 'pit next lap', adjacent laps from the same race/driver are highly overlapping.
rationale: Because the label is 'pit next lap', adjacent laps from the same race/driver are highly overlapping. Purged or embargoed validation is recommended in other forward-horizon domains to reduce optimistic CV, and race strategy logic is race-specific enough that random/group-lite folds can still leak stint patterns.
implementation_hint: Evaluate every candidate with folds grouped by full `Year+Race`, and embargo 1-2 laps around validation race boundaries if mixed-race chronological splits are used. Use this stricter CV only for model selection, not necessarily final refit.
expected_effect: May lower local CV but improve leaderboard correlation and reduce overfitting to race-specific pit windows.
risk: Could reject genuinely useful features if the stricter split is too pessimistic for the test distribution.
